title: dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. cruenta
intro: Dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. cruenta, a subspecies of the orchid family, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of glycosides and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza incarnata subsp. cruenta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or tincture, and can also be dried and used as a powder for various health-related purposes.
